span.p:
Kaggle · Germany Used Cars 2023
~200k rows · 10 columns
brand · model · mileage · hp · year · fuel · gear · price

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: CSV Ingestion

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EDA & Basic Cleaning
fix dtypes · drop duplicates · remove obvious invalid values

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Train / Test Split — random_state = 42
no labels · no thresholds · no encoders computed yet

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compute price_segment Threshold
from TRAINING SET price only
threshold = median or 75th pct of y_train_price
y_train_class = high / low
y_test_class = same threshold applied
test prices never used to set threshold

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Imputation
median for numeric · most_frequent for categorical
